---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to ARG
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution
What change would you like to see?

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches and why they were rejected.

## Locality check
- [ ] This feature can be implemented without outbound network calls
- [ ] Any new dependencies are pure Python or compatible with Apple Silicon
- [ ] The proposed change does not require a daemon or background service
